title: Implement Risk-Adjusted Allocation Policy
description: Shift from equal allocation to optimized risk-adjusted allocation. This is projected to improve NPV by $172,364 (+3.2%) annually.
action_items: Prioritize Low Risk tier with 40% of monthly capacity
Allocate 40% to Medium-Low Risk tier
Limit Medium-High and High Risk tiers to 10% each
Review allocation quarterly based on performance

title: Implement Dynamic Capacity Management
description: Monthly demand varies from 13,200 to 17,250. Adjust operational capacity to match seasonal patterns.
action_items: Scale up processing capacity during Q4 peak season
Maintain baseline capacity of 16,000 monthly increases
Build buffer capacity for demand spikes
Monitor real-time demand vs forecast variance

title: Enhance Risk Monitoring Framework
description: With weighted monthly default rate of 4.05%, implement early warning indicators and portfolio stress testing.
action_items: Track tier migration patterns monthly
Set alert thresholds for default rate increases
Conduct quarterly stress tests on portfolio
Review and update transition probabilities semi-annually

title: Establish Model Governance Framework
description: Formalize model validation, monitoring, and update procedures to ensure continued accuracy and regulatory compliance.
action_items: Document all model assumptions and limitations
Establish quarterly model performance review
Create backtesting protocol for optimization model
Define escalation procedures for model drift

title: Automate Allocation Decisions
description: Develop automated decision engine to implement optimal allocation in real-time based on current portfolio state and demand.
action_items: Build API for real-time allocation recommendations
Integrate with loan origination system
Implement A/B testing framework for policy refinement
Create management dashboard for monitoring
